去年4月我們在歐聯和蛆雲達斯踢了一場踢了一場比賽賽。阿積士剛被判了一個自由球，我和迪莊還有另外一個隊友站在球邊上。自由球並不是要由我來罰，我只是誘餌。
　　在這個時候，C朗突然徑直走過來看著我說：「怎麼樣，到底來不來蛆記？」
　　就這樣，毫無徵兆蹦出的一句話，他說完轉過身走開了。
　　我想都沒想，就脫口而出：「如果你想要我，我就去！」

應該都叫全能 而唔係印象中嘅跑狗一隻
仲有係十幾年前無咁多前鋒要成日回後造波嘅大潮流 或者話無咁睇重呢啲build up野

而且我執著個位係佢加盟巴塞時尤其是頭兩年 直頭係世界上最top嘅前鋒唔只係一流咁簡單

2005 2006 呢兩季五大聯賽所有賽事入波最多嘅就係吞精

可能我都少少誤導左你
但想講既係全能性
借etoo黎講只係帶出而家巴未必需要佢依種前鋒，就算佢係入球機器都好，但巴更需要一種進攻多面手令成進攻更多元化

絕對無踩低etoo既意思

我知你無踩佢
我只係覺得你誤會左佢
佢一樣可以令進攻好多元化
佢少幫手buildup係因為潮流所然而唔係技術唔支持
無睇列卡特巴塞都有睇哥狗第一年 伊度奧咪一樣踢得好好
不過講啲過左去嘅球員其實無咩意思了
佢喺巴塞走左都十年 已經有少少關公戰秦瓊嘅感覺

Rakitic: “Hopefully I can play until I’m 41. I feel perfect in this moment, I have a lot of football left.”

“I try to treat everyone the same, from the security guard to Lionel Messi.”

“We have the luck of having the best player in world football here at our club.”

“Not even my father would say what Mourinho said (praise) about me. It was incredible hearing that. He’s one of the best coaches in the world and it gave me huge confidence and motivation. I want to see Mourinho back in football soon.”

“I’ve been at Barça 4 and a half very good years. I’m a part of the best club in the world and that makes me proud. I love football, a lot, I never get bored. There’s a lot of repetition in training and travels but I still love it. If that love fades, I would stop.”

“I still find it incredible to play football every day and when you like something you have to be the best at it. I would never describe football as a job because it doesn’t feel like a job.”

“There were no words to describe how that moment felt. It’s impossible. You want to hug every fan in the stadium. And when that moment is gone, it motivates you to do it again. We haven’t been able to since but I have faith in these players for this season.”

“Everyone would like to play with 20 homegrown players from La Masia, but that’s almost impossible. They had a great generation with Pique, Xavi, Messi, Iniesta, Valdes and Busquets. But that doesn’t happen often so in order to compete, you have to make signings.”
